prompt_text:
### Demographics: 64-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 9 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Worsening edema and dyspnea over the last 3 months.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
Heart failure: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II)
Simple Steatosis
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Rheumatoid Arthritis
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF: HFimpEF (NYHA Class II); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Simple Steatosis; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Never smoker; No alcohol use

### Medication information
- Current medications: Pioglitazone 15mg once daily; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Olanzapine (10 mg nightly), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 71.7 kg; Height 150.2 cm; BMI 31.8 kg/m²; Blood pressure 126/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 9.0%; 9 months ago 9.0%; 6 months ago 9.5%; 3 months ago 9.4%; current 10.1%), FPG (12 months ago 219mg/dL; 9 months ago 192mg/dL; 6 months ago 203mg/dL; 3 months ago 254mg/dL; current 250mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 71.1kg; 9 months ago 70.8kg; 6 months ago 68.8kg; 3 months ago 72.1kg; current 71.7kg), Height (12 months ago 150.2cm; 9 months ago 150.2cm; 6 months ago 150.2cm; 3 months ago 150.2cm; current 150.2cm), BMI (12 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 31.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 31.8kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 123mmHg; 9 months ago 125mmHg; 6 months ago 124mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 126mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 75mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 62U/L; 9 months ago 60U/L; 6 months ago 68U/L; 3 months ago 67U/L; current 63U/L), AST (12 months ago 39U/L; 9 months ago 40U/L; 6 months ago 38U/L; 3 months ago 37U/L; current 42U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 17mL/min/1.73m²; current 17mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 689mg/g; 9 months ago 513mg/g; 6 months ago 750mg/g; 3 months ago 602mg/g; current 903mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 74mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 69mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 56mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 57mg/dL; 3 months ago 56mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 124mg/dL; 9 months ago 122mg/dL; 6 months ago 105mg/dL; 3 months ago 102mg/dL; current 113mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.0g/dL; 9 months ago 11.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.9g/dL; current 9.7g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
